description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the dmoonfire/mfgames-writing-js:1.0.0 Docker image and a single deploy stage. Add a publish job that runs in the deploy stage, is tagged with docker, executes `npm install` then `./node_modules/.bin/mfgames-writing-format build`, stores the `build` directory as an artifact, deploys to the `published` environment, runs only on the master branch and must be triggered manually. Add a stage job that also runs in the deploy stage with the same script commands, stores the `build` directory as an artifact, deploys to the `staging` environment, runs only on the master branch, and runs automatically. Both jobs share the same image and have no additional caches.
